text: carbs is 57.9g. but the real story is the context, not the nutrition profile.

pros first. shockingly dense on paper because unsweetened cocoa is one of the rare misc items that actually brings real numbers too. clear real-world role because if a misc item helps or harms behavior, that matters a lot. context tells the real story because that is the whole point of misc.

now the downsides. normal serving sizes are much smaller than 100 grams because that trims how much of the paper score you really realise. easy to overrate or misuse because this category attracts strong marketing and habits. better replacements often exist because that practical comparison matters.
Cocoa Powder (Unsweetened) is A tier. Best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
